summary: Completed comprehensive testing of three new pricing features: (1) Mock email notifications when subscription activates (subscription confirmation + payment receipt), (2) A/B testing pricing page with two visual variants + analytics tracking, (3) Annual billing toggle saving 20% (Voyager $86/yr, Odyssey $182/yr). All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/plans returns plans with price_monthly ($9, $19) AND price_annual ($86, $182) fields
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout with billing='monthly' creates Stripe checkout session (uses $9 for pro plan)
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout with billing='annual' creates Stripe checkout session (uses $86 for pro plan)
Backend: POST /api/analytics/pricing-event stores event without authentication
Backend: GET /api/analytics/pricing-stats returns aggregated stats with conversion_rate field (requires auth)
Frontend: /pricing page loads successfully with Monthly/Annual toggle
Frontend: Annual toggle shows -20% badge
Frontend: Clicking Annual displays $86/year for Voyager and $182/year for Odyssey
Frontend: Monthly equivalent shown with savings message (e.g., 'That's $7.17/mo — save 20%')
Frontend: Plan cards display features with green checkmarks for included features and gray X for excluded features
Frontend: Explorer plan shows 8 checkmarks and 3 X marks
Frontend: Voyager plan shows 9 checkmarks and 1 X mark
Frontend: Odyssey plan shows 10 checkmarks and 0 X marks
Frontend: FAQ section renders with 5 questions
Frontend: Footer CTA section renders with heading and 'Get Started Free' button
Frontend: A/B testing variant (A or B) stored in sessionStorage
Frontend: Analytics session ID tracked in sessionStorage
Frontend: Subscribe buttons are clickable and properly enabled/disabled
Frontend: Switching between Monthly and Annual updates prices correctly
Mock email notifications: Subscription confirmation email logged to memory
Mock email notifications: Payment receipt email logged to memory
